{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-13.
10,113 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-12 -> 2026-03-13)

- "Which national team will Spain face in a World Cup 2026 friendly on 27 March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Portugal: 0.20, Argentina: 0.15, Colombia: 0.15, Netherlands: 0.15, Brazil: 0.10} | Truth: Serbia
  Brier: -0.12 | TW-Score: -9.06
- "Which country will Iran's foreign minister say was used as a launch area for U.S. attacks by March 15, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Bahrain: 0.20, Qatar: 0.20, Kuwait: 0.15, Saudi Arabia: 0.15, United Arab Emirates: 0.10} | Truth: United Arab Emirates
  Brier: +0.06 | TW-Score: +13.94

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 331 (273 resolved, 58 active)
- accuracy: 9.7% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -690.51
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
